name: The Crypto Dog
description: The Crypto Dog ($DOG) community has taken ownership of this token profile after the original developer went inactive and abandoned the project without communication or ongoing support. The community has stepped in to: - Add and lock permanent liquidity on Meteora DAMM V2 pools. - Reinvest fees back into liquidity and community initiatives. - Build and coordinate real holder participation to stabilize and grow the token. This takeover is to ensure the coin has active stewardship, transparent liquidity management, and no risk of rug or abandonment. All actions are community-driven, no dev sell-off. We are committed to making $DOG a holder-owned project. Add liquidity, hold the floor, and join the pack.
